_comment: Vendored Pixabay copyright-free audio assets. Pixabay Content License (https://pixabay.com/service/license-summary/) permits commercial use, no attribution required. Tracked here for licenses.json bookkeeping and to make the source/license auditable in the repo. Do NOT add files here without verifying the Pixabay download page shows the Pixabay Content License and that the Author has not opted into a custom license.

tracks.author: delosound
tracks.notes: Primary BGM bed. Tense, slow-building -- fits FAANG-interview-pressure framing. Replaces procedural triad pad in mixBgmBed when present.

tracks.author: pwlpl
tracks.notes: Replaces procedural 350ms aevalsrc chirp at t=0. Real impact transient + tonal body.

tracks.author: koiroylers
tracks.notes: Last ~1.5s of video on end-card scene. Reward / takeaway lift before subscribe CTA.
